Motion For Entering Judgmnt Pursuant To Deft'S Default Under Settlement And Release Agreement
Off Calendar Jul-16-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC's Motion For Entering Judgment Pursuant To Defendant's Default Under Settlement And Release Agreement

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Granted as unopposed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/CK)
